# Tevrix AI — AI-Native BPO Platform
# https://tevrixai.com
# Last updated: 2026-05-11

## About
Tevrix AI replaces traditional offshore BPO with autonomous AI agents that work 24/7 across 120+ languages. Built in India, designed for enterprise.

## Key Pages

/ — Homepage: Overview of Tevrix AI's autonomous AI agents for enterprise BPO, customer care, HR, and finance automation.

/ai-bpo — AI BPO Platform: Full details on how Tevrix AI replaces offshore business process outsourcing with multi-agent AI systems at a fraction of the cost.

/service/customer-care — AI Customer Care: Autonomous customer support across voice, chat, email, and WhatsApp in 120+ languages with sub-second response times.

/service/hr-automation — AI HR & Talent Ops: End-to-end AI hiring pipeline — CV parsing, proctored assessments, AI interviews, and ranked shortlists.

/service/financial-analyst — AI Financial Analyst: Real-time bookkeeping, invoice processing, anomaly detection, and audit-ready reporting with zero manual entry.

/about — About Tevrix AI: Company background, founders, mission, and vision for AI-native enterprise operations.

/privacy — Privacy Policy: Data handling, processing, and compliance information.

/terms — Terms of Service: Legal terms governing use of the Tevrix AI platform.

## Product Signals
- Six AI agents included in a single subscription
- Supports 120+ languages for multilingual customer experience
- Sub-second response times, under 200ms latency for voice AI
- 85% cost reduction vs. traditional offshore BPO
- 24/7 autonomous operation with zero shift premiums
- Typical deployment in 4–6 weeks

## Target Buyers
Heads of Customer Experience, Operations Leaders, IT Automation Directors at mid-to-large enterprises seeking to replace or augment offshore BPO operations.
